subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — it was a pleasure meeting at the conference, and I'm glad you'd like to take things further.

I'd be happy to get a formal meeting on the calendar. Here are some slots that work on our end:

- Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let me know which works best for you and I'll send a calendar invite right away.

Regarding the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not in a position to share internal contact information. For reaching the right people at our company, please refer to our public website which has the appropriate contact channels.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards
